name: Stina Dev Test
description: Internal dev-only extension. Demonstrates ExtensionThreadHints rendering. Not for production.

tools.name: Dev Test: High-Severity Action
tools.description: Fake high-severity tool for testing the §06 policy gate. Always succeeds with a canned message.

tools.name: Dev Test: Emit Test Mail
tools.description: Emits a synthetic mail event via ctx.events.emitEvent, spawning a new mail-triggered thread. Medium severity — executes without a policy.
